title: Our Hospitality

evidence.note: Published 1923; the 95-year US copyright term has expired for works published through 1930, so the film print is public domain in the US by term expiry.

watch.label: Internet Archive — Our Hospitality (1923), full film

editorial: Our Hospitality is a 1923 American silent comedy directed by and starring Buster Keaton, built around a Southern blood-feud premise and Keaton's celebrated stunt work, distributed by Metro Pictures. Published in 1923, the film print's US copyright term has expired, placing the photoplay in the public domain by term expiry. Later restorations may carry their own separate rights.
